other_observers: RMBO transect training crew; Brandon Percival, Mark Peterson, and Bill Maynard originally found and identified the bird.
description: A richly colored warbler, with deep chestnut flanks, throat, and cap. Pale yellow nape and belly were also visible. Dark wings with two white wing bars. Black mask. Dark warbler-shaped bill.Behaviors: The bird was mainly trying to keep out of the wind, hopping along on the ground or in low branches.Call: not heardPlumage: Adult Alternate
